arts.ttl: Augsburg vs Freiburg preview: Visitors' top four credentials put to the test
arts.sum: Freiburg's top four credentials will be put to the test on Sunday afternoon as they travel to an Augsburg side unbeaten in seven Bundesliga matches.

arts.ttl: Preview: Augsburg vs. Freiburg - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Bundesliga clash between Augsburg and Freiburg, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
